items.title: Watch: Flooded towns and evacuations as Chile hit by heavy rain
items.dek: A "state of catastrophe" has been declared in Coquimbo and Huasco following the downpour.
items.body: A "state of catastrophe" has been declared in Coquimbo and Huasco following the downpour.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Lebanese army says troops deploying in 'pilot zone' after Israeli withdrawal
items.dek: A US-brokered agreement should see Israeli troops pulling out of a small part of Lebanon occupied during their conflict with Hezbollah.
items.body: A US-brokered agreement should see Israeli troops pulling out of a small part of Lebanon occupied during their conflict with Hezbollah.
